summary: The diff implements HeroSection.tsx with a full-width hero banner using the correct image path, dark gradient overlay, centered overlay content with heading/subtitle/CTA, and sage-green button triggering the trial flow. All major requirements appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: Decorative rule with gold horizontal lines and 'Sovereign Communities · Blockchain' eyebrow label above the heading
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify any decorative rule or eyebrow label above the primary heading in the hero overlay content.

hallucinated_features.description: Subtle warm tint overlay (forest/30 gradient) applied in addition to the dark gradient overlay
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies only a single subtle dark gradient overlay for legibility; a second warm tint overlay layer was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Mouse-enter/mouse-leave hover color change via inline style manipulation on the CTA button
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify hover state behavior for the CTA button beyond displaying it with sage-green (#A8CABA).
